inputs.label: Desired Molarity
inputs.businessContext: Target concentration of the electrolyte solution in moles per liter

businessContext_i18n.en: Target concentration of the electrolyte solution in moles per liter
businessContext_i18n.tr: Elektrolit çözeltisinin litre başına mol cinsinden hedef konsantrasyonu.

inputs.label: Solution Volume
inputs.businessContext: Final volume of the solution to prepare

businessContext_i18n.en: Final volume of the solution to prepare

inputs.label: Solute Purity
inputs.businessContext: Purity percentage of the solid solute (e.g., 99.5 means 99.5% pure)

businessContext_i18n.en: Purity percentage of the solid solute (e.g., 99.5 means 99.5% pure)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Katı çözünenin saflık yüzdesi (örneğin, 99.5, %99.5 saf anlamına gelir).

inputs.label: Molecular Weight (Anhydrous)
inputs.businessContext: Molar mass of the anhydrous solute

businessContext_i18n.en: Molar mass of the anhydrous solute

inputs.label: Water of Hydration
inputs.businessContext: Number of water molecules per formula unit (e.g., 5 for CuSO4·5H2O; 0 for anhydrous)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of water molecules per formula unit (e.g., 5 for CuSO4·5H2O; 0 for anhydrous)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Formül birimi başına su molekülü sayısı (ör. CuSO4·5H2O için 5; susuz için 0)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
